title: geracium lampsanoides
intro: Geranium lampsanoides, also known as Geranium thunbergii, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geranium genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual irregularities, as well as its use in wound healing and skin care. Geranium lampsanoides can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
